mapper.sql: stock_code, stock_name, country, market, market_type, industry, current_price, price_change, change_rate, volume, market_cap, updated_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
SELECT FROM STOCK ORDER BY stock_code
SELECT FROM STOCK ORDER BY stock_code
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE country = #{country} AND (market = #{market} OR market_type = #{market}) ORDER BY stock_code
SELECT DISTINCT industry FROM STOCK WHERE industry IS NOT NULL ORDER BY industry
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE volume IS NOT NULL ORDER BY volume DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE volume IS NOT NULL ORDER BY volume DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE change_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY change_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE change_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY change_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY stock_code LIMIT 50
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY stock_code LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCK ( stock_code, stock_name, country, market, market_type, industry, current_price, price_change, change_rate, volume, market_cap, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{country}, #{market}, #{marketType}, #{industry}, #{currentPrice}, #{priceChange}, #{changeRate}, #{volume}, #{marketCap}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO STOCK ( stock_code, stock_name, country, market, market_type, industry, current_price, price_change, change_rate, volume, market_cap, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{country}, #{market}, #{marketType}, #{industry}, #{currentPrice}, #{priceChange}, #{changeRate}, #{volume}, #{marketCap}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCK SET stock_name = #{stockName}, current_price = #{currentPrice}, price_change = #{priceChange}, change_rate = #{changeRate}, volume = #{volume}, market_cap = #{marketCap}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}

UPDATE STOCK SET stock_name = #{stockName}, current_price = #{currentPrice}, price_change = #{priceChange}, change_rate = #{changeRate}, volume = #{volume}, market_cap = #{marketCap}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
UPDATE STOCK SET current_price = #{currentPrice}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
UPDATE STOCK SET current_price = #{currentPrice}, price_change = #{priceChange}, change_rate = #{priceChangeRate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK WHERE country = #{country}
